## Chapter
<!-- e.g., Chapter 02 — Sensor Layer -->

## Section
<!-- Which section within the chapter? -->

## Issue Type
- [ ] Factual error
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Unclear explanation
- [ ] Outdated technology reference
- [ ] Missing diagram
- [ ] Improvement suggestion

## Description
<!-- Describe the issue clearly -->

## Suggested Fix
<!-- What should it say instead, or what should be added? -->

## Supporting Evidence
<!-- Links, datasheets, or references that support your suggestion -->
